allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath 'python' -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8765','--directory','d:\\leveld' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), bytes=$\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath 'python' -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8765','--directory','d:\\leveld' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; foreach \($p in @\('/index.html','/js/app.js','/js/addany.js','/js/gemini.js','/css/components.css'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "$p`tHTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.RawContentLength\)b" } catch { "$p`tERR $_" } }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
